examples: His love of conversation, his affection, his indifference to riches, even his garrulity, are interesting traits of character.
We headed upstairs, del Toro adopting the hushed garrulity of a docent.
Still, many of us prefer the Walton plain of 1653, before his advancing years brought with them garrulity and increasingly overt piety, even in his own later editions.
